prompt: Storyboard frame, 9:16 vertical, authentic Flip & Dive 3D gameplay shot from low side angle: pink ragdoll character over-rotating in mid-air above a small cyan (#AEE2FF) square pool, purple (#C754D9) height markers ticking down the tower edge, JUMP button faded at bottom, bold pink (#FF007F) overlay banner reading 'JUST AIM FOR THE POOL…', minimalist 3D with bright contrasting colors and simple geometric shapes, clean pastel sky, no textures.
